rulings.Case Title: JESUS THOMAS SOTO VS. PETER LOUIE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Taxing Costs And Striking Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday February 27, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT PETER LOUIE Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Taxing Costs And Striking Costs continued to March 21, 2018. Plaintiff to file a supplemental brief (not to exceed 3 pages) to address issues raised in reply (3:22-28) as to whether "general legal advice" fees for services provided after August 16, 2017 have been included in the Memo of Costs, and if such fees where included whether they are recoverable in this action. Supplemental brief to be filed by Plaintiff and served no later than March 16, 2018. = (501/AB)

rulings.Case Title: TERESITA SANTOS WILLIAMS VS. ALBERTO A. SANTOS ET AL
